name: discord_game_bot
description: Discord game bot platform with isolated mafia and liar modules

scripts.build:clean: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); fs.mkdirSync('mafia/.cache', { recursive: true }); fs.rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true }); fs.rmSync('mafia/.cache/root-build.tsbuildinfo', { force: true }); fs.rmSync('mafia/.cache/web-client-build.tsbuildinfo', { force: true })"
scripts.dev:mafia:preview: cross-env DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN=preview-token DISCORD_APPLICATION_ID=preview-app PUBLIC_BASE_URL=http://localhost:3010 WEB_SESSION_SECRET=preview-web-session-secret JOIN_TICKET_SECRET=preview-join-ticket-secret tsx mafia/src/dev/web-preview.ts
scripts.dev:mafia:practice: cross-env PRACTICE_SCENARIO=practice1 DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN=practice-token DISCORD_APPLICATION_ID=practice-app PUBLIC_BASE_URL=http://localhost:3014 WEB_SESSION_SECRET=practice-web-session-secret JOIN_TICKET_SECRET=practice-join-ticket-secret tsx mafia/src/dev/web-practice.ts
scripts.dev:mafia:practice1: cross-env PRACTICE_SCENARIO=practice1 DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN=practice-token DISCORD_APPLICATION_ID=practice-app PUBLIC_BASE_URL=http://localhost:3014 WEB_SESSION_SECRET=practice-web-session-secret JOIN_TICKET_SECRET=practice-join-ticket-secret tsx mafia/src/dev/web-practice.ts
scripts.dev:mafia:practice2: cross-env PRACTICE_SCENARIO=practice2 DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN=practice-token DISCORD_APPLICATION_ID=practice-app PUBLIC_BASE_URL=http://localhost:3014 WEB_SESSION_SECRET=practice-web-session-secret JOIN_TICKET_SECRET=practice-join-ticket-secret tsx mafia/src/dev/web-practice.ts
scripts.dev:mafia:practice3: cross-env PRACTICE_SCENARIO=practice3 DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN=practice-token DISCORD_APPLICATION_ID=practice-app PUBLIC_BASE_URL=http://localhost:3014 WEB_SESSION_SECRET=practice-web-session-secret JOIN_TICKET_SECRET=practice-join-ticket-secret tsx mafia/src/dev/web-practice.ts
scripts.dev:mafia:practice4: cross-env PRACTICE_SCENARIO=practice4 DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN=practice-token DISCORD_APPLICATION_ID=practice-app PUBLIC_BASE_URL=http://localhost:3014 WEB_SESSION_SECRET=practice-web-session-secret JOIN_TICKET_SECRET=practice-join-ticket-secret tsx mafia/src/dev/web-practice.ts
scripts.dev:mafia:practice:all: cross-env PRACTICE_SCENARIO=all DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN=practice-token DISCORD_APPLICATION_ID=practice-app PUBLIC_BASE_URL=http://localhost:3014 WEB_SESSION_SECRET=practice-web-session-secret JOIN_TICKET_SECRET=practice-join-ticket-secret tsx mafia/src/dev/web-practice.ts
scripts.pm2:start: npm run build && pm2 start ecosystem.config.cjs --only discord-game-bot
scripts.pm2:restart: npm run build && pm2 startOrRestart ecosystem.config.cjs --only discord-game-bot
scripts.test: cross-env DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN=test-token DISCORD_APPLICATION_ID=test-app PUBLIC_BASE_URL=https://mafia.test WEB_SESSION_SECRET=test-web-secret JOIN_TICKET_SECRET=test-join-secret tsx --test mafia/tests/all.test.ts liar/tests/all.test.ts
